shadowrun-items-importer.title: Shadowrun Items Importer
shadowrun-items-importer.placeholder:
Paste a Shadowrun 6e item block here.

Planned use:
- weapon blocks
- armor blocks
- gear blocks
- cyberware / bioware
- magical items and other supported entries

This first version only provides the importer window scaffold.
shadowrun-items-importer.hint.window: Initial scaffold ready. Real Ohm.js parsing is the next step.
shadowrun-items-importer.notifications.s: Shadowrun Items Importer is intended for the Shadowrun 6th Edition system.
shadowrun-items-importer.notifications.n: No item types were discovered from the active system.
shadowrun-items-importer.notifications.m: Paste an item block before importing.
shadowrun-items-importer.notifications.o: Ohm.js is not available. Include it in the module before using the parser.
shadowrun-items-importer.notifications.n: The parser scaffold is wired, but real Shadowrun item parsing is not implemented yet.
Enable verbose logging in the browser console.
shadowrun-items-importer.settings.rememb: Store the last selected destination folder for the importer window.
shadowrun-items-importer.settings.lastFo: Internal setting used to persist the last selected destination folder.
shadowrun-items-importer.settings.lastTy: Internal setting used to persist the last selected item type.
